user.title: User
user.description: User account schema including custom metadata, active subscription details and credit usage counter

id.description: Unique identifier matching the user's ID

infografiasUsadas.description: Number of infographics generated in the current reset period

periodoReset.description: Formatted period key pointing to the reset timestamp

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp representing user sign-up date

activo.description: Indicates if the user account is active or suspended

customLogo.description: Optional URL for custom branding logo

coupon.title: Coupon
coupon.description: Discount coupon schema used to activate premium plan durations

id.description: Unique ID for the coupon record

durationDays.description: Duration in days allocated upon redemption

maxUses.description: Maximum number of times the coupon code can be redeemed

usedBy.description: Array of user IDs who have redeemed this coupon

expiry.description: ISO date-time string marking code expiry

activo.description: Determines if coupon can be actively redeemed

/users/{userId}.description: Sync collection of active registered faithful

/coupons/{couponId}.description: Sync collection of platform reward and tier upgraders
